details.test: Task 1: Book cheapest one-time Standard Mowing (medium yard)
Task 2: Enroll in highest-rated spring & summer lawn package <= $120/visit
Task 3: Request custom backyard landscaping quote with $8,000 max budget
Task 4: Schedule tree trimming for 3 trees with 4.5+ star provider under $200
Task 5: Add 3 organic vegetable fertilizers (5 units total) to cart
Task 6: Choose irrigation installation package with shortest duration within $100 and schedule consultation
Task 7: Save drought-tolerant plants article and subscribe to monthly tips
Task 8: Request earliest weekday yard clean-up slot after 3 PM for ZIP 94110
Task 9: Build custom monthly maintenance plan with 3 services under $250/month
Task 10: Use FAQ to find rescheduling help and send reschedule request
